personalInfo.name: Samarth Singh Rawat
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer & ML Enthusiast
personalInfo.bio: Detail-oriented and motivated B.Tech IT student at KIIT Bhubaneswar with hands-on experience in Machine Learning, IoT Systems and Data Structures. Passionate about creating efficient, data-driven, and scalable solutions that merge AI, embedded technology, and web systems.

skills.items: Git, Microsoft Office, Power BI, Arduino, LaTeX, VS Code

projects.title: Movie Recommendation System
description: Built a collaborative filtering engine to generate personalized movie suggestions.
Processed large datasets and designed a simple web UI for user input and recommendations.

projects.title: IoT Smart Alarm Clock
projects.tech: ESP32-C3, OLED, NTP, RTC, Buzzer, NeoPixel, Rotary Encoder
description: Developed a smart alarm clock using ESP32-C3 with time sync via NTP and DS1307 RTC.
Integrated buzzer alerts, rotary encoder controls, and motion sensors for user interaction.
Added NeoPixel LED animations and OLED display for enhanced UI feedback.

projects.title: ISL Hand Gesture Recognition
description: Processed ISL hand gesture datasets in CSV format with landmark and movement data.
Trained a Random Forest model to classify Indian Sign Language gestures accurately.
